mapper.sql: LEFT JOIN ( SELECT s1.trip_id, s1.id AS settlement_id, s1.status AS settlement_status FROM settlements s1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT trip_id, MAX(created_at) AS max_created FROM settlements GROUP BY trip_id ) s2 ON s1.trip_id = s2.trip_id AND s1.created_at = s2.max_created ) latest ON latest.trip_id = t.id

if.test: cond.status != null and cond.status != '' and cond.status != 'all'

where.if: AND ( (#{cond.status} = 'live' AND latest.settlement_status IS NULL) OR (#{cond.status} = 'settle' AND latest.settlement_status = 'in_progress') OR (#{cond.status} = 'done' AND latest.settlement_status = 'completed') )

mapper.select:
SELECT t.id AS id, t.name AS name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trip_members tm WHERE tm.trip_id = t.id) AS memberCount, DATE_FORMAT(t.start_date, '%Y.%m.%d') AS startDate, DATE_FORMAT(t.end_date, '%Y.%m.%d') AS endDate, (DATEDIFF(t.end_date, t.start_date) + 1) AS tripDays, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(e.amount) FROM expenses e WHERE e.trip_id = t.id), 0) AS totalAmount, CASE WHEN latest.settlement_status IS NULL THEN 'live' WHEN latest.settlement_status = 'in_progress' THEN 'settle' ELSE 'done' END AS status, DATE_FORMAT(t.created_at, '%Y.%m.%d') AS createdAt FROM trips t
ORDER BY t.created_at DESC LIMIT #{cond.offset}, #{cond.limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trips WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT t.id AS id, t.name AS name, DATE_FORMAT(t.start_date, '%Y.%m.%d') AS startDate, DATE_FORMAT(t.end_date, '%Y.%m.%d') AS endDate, (DATEDIFF(t.end_date, t.start_date) + 1) AS tripDays, DATE_FORMAT(t.created_at, '%Y.%m.%d') AS createdAt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trip_members tm WHERE tm.trip_id = t.id) AS memberCount, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(e.amount) FROM expenses e WHERE e.trip_id = t.id), 0) AS totalAmount, CASE WHEN latest.settlement_status IS NULL THEN 'live' WHEN latest.settlement_status = 'in_progress' THEN 'settle' ELSE 'done' END AS status FROM trips t
WHERE t.id = #{id}

SELECT ec.label AS label, SUM(e.amount) AS amount FROM expenses e JOIN expense_categories ec ON ec.code = e.category_code WHERE e.trip_id = #{id} GROUP BY ec.code, ec.label, ec.sort_order ORDER BY ec.sort_order

SELECT tm.id AS memberId, tm.display_name AS name, tm.short_name AS shortName, sp.status AS settleStatus FROM trip_members tm LEFT JOIN ( SELECT s1.trip_id, s1.id AS settlement_id FROM settlements s1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT trip_id, MAX(created_at) AS max_created FROM settlements GROUP BY trip_id ) s2 ON s1.trip_id = s2.trip_id AND s1.created_at = s2.max_created ) latest ON latest.trip_id = tm.trip_id LEFT JOIN settlement_participants sp ON sp.settlement_id = latest.settlement_id AND sp.member_id = tm.id WHERE tm.trip_id = #{id} ORDER BY tm.joined_at
